name: american bean chile
notes: I don't have a solid recipe nailed down for this one yet — american chili is a wide category with lots of valid variations. ingredients listed are common building blocks rather than a fixed formula. picnic-leaning version uses ketchup/mustard/dill/tofurkey-or-turkey; stew-leaning version pulls in jalapenos, red beans, beer. greek yogurt or sour cream finish the bowl; maple syrup balances acidity from the ketchup/tomato; cilantro brightens.
